reference: Hello. This is all suggestive of a tubal pregnancy. Please get an urgent ultrasonography done and receive surgical treatment if a tubal pregnancy is found. If there is no pregnancy detected on the ultrasonography, relax and carry on; there is nothing to worry about.
text: Hello, this is all suggestive of a tubal pregnancy. Please get an urgent ultrasonography done and receive surgical treatment if a tubal pregnancy is found. If there is no pregnancy detected on the ultrasonography, relax and carry on; there is nothing to worry about.
